title: feat: fully dynamic issue triage — Polly decides every action
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Polly gets a promotion
gist.blurb: Our favorite bee just got a major promotion! Polly can now dynamically read, reply, label, and close GitHub issues all on her own.
gist.summary: Upgraded the repository's GitHub Actions workflow to give Polly full autonomy over issue triage, allowing dynamic combinations of commenting, labeling, and closing.
gist.impact: Contributors will experience faster, more context-aware support and issue resolution directly from our AI mascot.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an autonomous triage manager. She wears a tiny headset or holds a clipboard, sorting through GitHub issue tickets. The Nomnom creature helps by eating the spam and duplicate tickets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny headset and holding a clipboard, sorting through floating digital issue tickets. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of spam tickets nearby. A retro terminal glows with lime green (#ecf874) code. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
